case_title: C.C.S.F. A MUNICIPAL CORP. vs. BALLARD, RICKIE RENEE et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF C.C.S.F. A MUNICIPAL CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT BALLARD, RICKIE RENEE BALLARD J. DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT BALLARD, RICKIE RENEE
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF C.C.S.F. A MUNICIPAL CORP. COURT TRIAL SET FOR JUL-19-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 02 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF C.C.S.F. A MUNICIPAL CORP. SERVED JUN-24-1994, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BALLARD J.
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF C.C.S.F. A MUNICIPAL CORP. AS TO DEFENDANT BALLARD J.
#2 JUDGE CHOPPELAS; M. BRADY, CSR - C/C FOR COURT TRIAL, ALL PRESENT, EXCEPT J. BALLARD (IN DEFAULT STATUS). ORAL & DOCU EVID PRESENTED. CASE UNDER SUBMISSION.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT FOR DEFENDANT RICKIE RENEE BALLARD, & AGAINST PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, PROVIDED THAT DEFENDANT PAYS TO PLAINTIFF THE SUM OF $2543.55 ON OR BEFORE 5 DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS JUDGMENT. NOTE THAT JUDGMENT REFLECTS A 5% REDUCTION OF RENT & DAMAGES DUE TO THE UNINHABITABILITY OF THE PREMISES. IN THE EVENT THAT JUDGMENT FOR THE AMOUNT OF $2543.55 IS NOT PAID TO PLAINTIFF, BY DEFENDANT, WITHIN 5 DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS JUDGMENT, THEN JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF, AND AGAINST DEFENDANT FOR RESTITUTION & POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 1450 DIVISADERO STREET, #106 SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA, RENT & DAMAGES FOR THE SUM OF
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF C.C.S.F. A MUNICIPAL CORP.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BALLARD, RICKIE RENEE BALLARD J. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1450 DIVISADERO ST. #106, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $2,677.42 RENT, $560.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,237.42, LEASE FORFEITED, COSTS PER COST BILL
